pageContext.name: Maam
pageContext.description: The kind martial artist Maam from DRAGON QUEST: THE ADVENTURE OF DAI is joining the ARTFX J series!  Equipped with her Amdo Dark Armour Fist, she is brought to life in a powerful pose with her orichalcum-shattering iron fists!  Her lovely yet powerful sculpt and delicately glittering Dark Armour Fist make for a beautiful and impressive finish.  The waist cloth representing her determination and metal fist on her right hand packed with emotions have also been faithfully recreated!  The deep marks on the stand also call back to Maam's fierce battles against formidable enemies.  Be sure to add her with the other Disciples of Avan, including Dai, Hyunckel, and Pop, in the valor of their final battle!
